settings.paragraph: Cart and checkout prices always show currency codes. Example: $1.00 USD.

settings.product_in_cart_info: Increase average order value by suggesting products directly in the cart.

note.info_1: To exclude a product from being counted in the cart icon bubble (the number of items in the cart), add a 'cart-hidden' tag to that product.
note.info_2: Additionally, all gift products must be unique. The main product displayed on the product page, as well as products from upsells, bundles, and other gifts, will not qualify.
note.info_3: To offer this product as a free gift, go to Shopify Admin > Discounts, create a discount that sets the product price to free, then save and apply it to activate the offer.

settigns.featured_image: If empty, default product image will be shown.
settigns.unlock_requirement_default: Required cart subtotal to unlock the gift. If set to 0, the gift is unlocked automatically.
settigns.progress_text_default: You're {amount} away from a free gift!
settigns.progress_text_info: Use {amount} to display the remaining amount to unlock the gift.
settigns.unlocked_text_default: Congrats! You unlocked a free gift!
settigns.unlocked_text_info: Displayed after the gift is unlocked.
settigns.product_lock_image: Display lock over image while product is locked.
settigns.price_content_info: Displayed instead of the regular price (eg. $0.00). This will work only if disabled “Show product price”

help.info: Offer free or conditional gifts in the cart drawer to boost order value.
Allow customers to calculate shipping costs in real-time for a smoother checkout process.

review-widget.name: Reviews (DTM)
review-widget.note: This section is powered by Debutify Theme Manager. To use this section, please select Reviews (Debutify Theme Manager) in theme settings.

thank_you_message.label: Thank you message
thank_you_message.default: Thank you! Your review should be displayed shortly.

help.info: Keep images fixed as customers scroll, ensuring key visuals stay visible throughout.

widget-notice.label: Learn about the essential disclaimer guidelines for using widgets and sections in your Debutify Theme.

help.info: Provide multiple shipping options to match your customers' delivery needs and preferences.

text.show_all_stroked_info: All text will be displayed as stroked.
text.stroked_text_info: Type words from the text field above that should be stroked. Use comma as separator.

help.info: Highlight promotions, flash sales, and updates with a customizable scrolling banner.
Showcase products in a stylish, interactive gallery to inspire and engage shoppers.

settings.title: Title
settings.image_info: The inherit option works only in the Custom Column section.

type.label: Discount type
type.info: If the Percentage discount type is selected, enter a value less than 100 to specify the discount percentage (e.g., entering 20 applies a 20% discount).

aniamtion.info:
The typing animation only works when a

tag is used.

video.label: Video
video.video_thumbnail_info: If empty, the first frame of the video will be displayed.
video.play_pause_info: Automatically enabled if autoplay is disabled.
video.muted_info: Use this instead of GIFs & animated WEBPs.

block-name.label: Block name
block-name.info: Used for internal identification. Do not modify otherwise it may lead to visual issues of widget naming.

settings.label: Label
settings.label_required: This is required for the field to be displayed on the product page.
settings.heading: Heading

custom_bullet_icon.label: Custom Bullet icon
custom_bullet_icon.info: Custom bullet icon will replace when bullets appears in text.

image_both.info: Desktop and mobile images/videos are reflected on priority basis in case of only one image/video is uploaded. In case of both image/video uploaded, it will reflect respective as selection.

image_position.info: Every image option is not work in every image. It will depend on Image dimension.

settings.caption: Caption

header.info: Show for specific products, collections, tags, types or leave empty to show on all product pages.
